content.json:
# Az-Stamper Activity Dashboard
Monitor tag stamping activity, success rates, and errors across enrolled subscriptions.

content.query:
traces
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where message startswith "Stamped"
| extend SubscriptionId = tostring(customDimensions.SubscriptionId)
| summarize
    TagsApplied = sum(toint(customDimensions.Count)),
    ResourcesStamped = dcount(tostring(customDimensions.ResourceId)),
    LastActivity = max(timestamp)
  by SubscriptionId
| order by ResourcesStamped desc
content.title: Active Subscriptions

content.query:
traces
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where message startswith "Stamped" or message startswith "Failed to stamp" or message startswith "Skipping"
| extend SubscriptionId = tostring(customDimensions.SubscriptionId)
| extend Status = case(
    message startswith "Stamped", "Success",
    message startswith "Failed", "Failed",
    "Skipped")
| summarize Count = count() by SubscriptionId, Status
| order by SubscriptionId asc, Status asc
content.title: Tag Success / Failure / Skip Rates by Subscription

content.query:
traces
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where message startswith "Stamped"
| extend ResourceType = tostring(customDimensions.ResourceType)
| summarize
    ResourcesStamped = dcount(tostring(customDimensions.ResourceId)),
    TotalTags = sum(toint(customDimensions.Count))
  by ResourceType
| top 15 by ResourcesStamped desc
content.title: Most-Tagged Resource Types

content.query:
traces
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where severityLevel >= 2
| where message !startswith "Skipping self-triggered"
| extend ResourceId = tostring(customDimensions.ResourceId)
| extend ResourceType = tostring(customDimensions.ResourceType)
| extend Reason = case(
    message has "ignore pattern", strcat("Ignore pattern: ", tostring(customDimensions.Pattern)),
    message has "50-tag limit", "Tag limit exceeded",
    message has "Cannot resolve caller", "Caller unresolvable",
    message has "Could not read tags", "Tag read failed",
    message has "Failed to stamp", "Stamp failed",
    message has "disabled", "Subscription disabled",
    message)
| project timestamp, ResourceId, ResourceType, Reason
| order by timestamp desc
| take 100
content.title: Errors & Skipped Resources

content.query:
traces
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where message startswith "Stamped" or message startswith "Failed to stamp"
| extend Status = iff(message startswith "Stamped", "Success", "Failed")
| summarize Count = count() by bin(timestamp, 1h), Status
| order by timestamp asc
content.title: Tagging Activity Timeline

content.query:
traces
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where message startswith "Stamped"
| extend Caller = tostring(customDimensions.Caller)
| summarize ResourcesStamped = dcount(tostring(customDimensions.ResourceId)) by Caller
| top 10 by ResourcesStamped desc
content.title: Top Callers (Who Triggered Stamping)
